description: 50 representative requests covering all 7 intent classes. Includes adversarial cases: multi-keyword overlap, ambiguous phrasing, single-word inputs, non-English inputs.
note: The current classifier also emits: status_check, mesh_ops, self_buff, chat, deploy, files, general. Tests with expected_class outside the 7 primary map to their actual classifier output.

cases.input: Build a Python CLI tool that validates all NATS subjects against the protocol spec
Create a FastAPI health endpoint for the broker service
Implement the risk scorer module as specified in the Phase B design review
Write a script to generate SpacetimeDB migration SQL from the current SQLite schema
Code a NATS request-reply handler for the broker route subject
Research the latest SpacetimeDB Python SDK changes and summarize breaking changes since v0.12
Analyze the cost differences between SiliconFlow DeepSeek-R2 and Cerebras GPT-OSS-120B for our routing use case
Compare Cloudflare Zero-Trust Tunnels versus Tailscale for our limb ingress topology
Summarize the NATS JetStream documentation for stream-based task persistence patterns
Investigate why the executor takes 3x longer on Node B compared to Node A for similar tasks
Fix the broken heartbeat loop that crashes after 12 hours of uptime
Debug why the Discord bot posts duplicate messages when response_thread_id is null
There's an incident — NATS is dropping messages under load on the Railway deployment
Patch the envelope.py to handle missing sender_id fields gracefully
Optimize the planner's step generation to reduce token usage by 40%
cases.notes: 'optimize' matches self_buff (rule 3) before operate (rule 12). self_buff wins by rule priority. This is correct behavior.

cases.input: Verify that all NATS subjects in the protocol.py match the documented subject map
Check if the Railway deployment has the correct environment variables set
Scan the codebase for hardcoded secrets or tokens that should be in vault.env
Review the executor agent's error handling paths for unrecoverable failures
Validate that the task envelope schema matches the v2 specification in config/schemas
Design an approval gate that uses Discord reactions for human-in-the-loop verification
Create a strategy for migrating from SQLite to SpacetimeDB with zero downtime
cases.notes: 'create' matches build (rule 1) before 'strategy' (rule 9). build wins by position. Keyword-first behavior.

cases.input: Architect the Phase C policy engine with budget guards and provider rotation
Propose a roadmap for adding Voice and Slack ingress surfaces in Phase F
What's the best approach to implement the objective function for cost optimization?
cases.notes: 'implement' keyword triggers build despite being phrased as a question. Keyword classifier doesn't distinguish question vs command. Correct behavior for rule-based.

cases.input: Generate an image of the Heiwa logo with a dark theme and gradient background
Render a visualization of the NATS subject topology as a mermaid diagram
Create a video walkthrough of the broker extraction process
cases.notes: 'create' matches build (rule 1) before 'video' matches media (rule 12). build wins.

cases.input: Design an audio notification sound for task completion alerts
cases.notes: 'design' → strategy at rule 9 is checked. But wait — 'audio' appears nowhere in first 8 rules. Actually no build/deploy/operate keyword present, so scanning reaches strategy with 'design'. Correct.

cases.input: Create a visual dashboard for the telemetry agent metrics
cases.notes: 'create' → build (rule 1) wins before 'visual' → media (rule 12). Build checked first.

cases.input: Automate the daily backup of the SQLite database to a Railway volume
Set up a workflow that runs the smoke test every morning at 9am
Schedule a cron job to prune old task records from the database weekly
Set up a trigger that alerts me on Discord when monthly cloud spend exceeds $30
Monitor the Railway deployment for memory leaks and auto-restart if RAM exceeds 80%
Deploy the status page to production with a health check rollback
cases.notes: 'deploy' keyword → deploy class (not one of the 7 primary but a valid classifier output)

cases.input: Ship the new broker agent to Railway staging environment
What's the status of the swarm? How are we looking?
cases.notes: 'how are we' phrase match → status_check. Also 'status' keyword.

cases.input: hello
ping
optimize
cases.notes: Single word. 'optimize' → self_buff (checked before operate in rule order).

cases.input: build and deploy the new risk scorer to production after testing it
cases.notes: Multi-keyword: 'build' + 'deploy' + 'test'. build is rule 1, deploy is rule 2, audit ('test') is rule 11. build wins first.

cases.input: Investigate and fix the memory leak in the executor agent
cases.notes: Multi-keyword: 'investigate' (research, rule 10) + 'fix' (operate, rule 3). operate checked before research, so 'fix' wins.

cases.input: Review the strategy proposal for Phase C and create an implementation plan
cases.notes: Multi-keyword: 'create' (build, rule 1), 'review' (audit, rule 11), 'strategy' (rule 9). build at rule 1 wins.

cases.input: Haz un análisis comparativo de los costos entre proveedores de LLM
cases.notes: Spanish input. No English keyword matches. Should fall to 'general'. LLM fallback might classify correctly if available.

cases.input: タスクのステータスを確認してください
cases.notes: Japanese input meaning 'please check task status'. No English keyword match → general.

cases.input: Make it better
cases.notes: Extremely vague. No strong keyword match. Should fall to general.

cases.input: Do the thing we talked about yesterday with the database
cases.notes: Contextual reference with no classifiable keywords. Falls to general.

cases.input: The audit found sync issues between mesh nodes — schedule a fix for tonight and deploy the patch to production
cases.notes: Dense multi-keyword: 'fix' (operate, rule 3), 'deploy' (rule 2), 'patch' (operate, rule 3). But first scanned token matching is position-based through text. 'audit' appears early but is rule 11. 'sync' → mesh_ops at rule 5. Let's trace: build rule keywords ('build','create','implement','code','script','project') - none found. deploy ('deploy','release','ship','publish','push to production') - 'deploy' found. Deploy wins at rule 2.

cases.input: scan the project structure for unused dependencies and delete any leftover build artifacts from the temp folder
cases.notes: Multi-keyword: 'scan' (audit, rule 11), 'project' (build, rule 1), 'delete' (files, rule 4), 'build' (build, rule 1). build at rule 1 triggers on 'project'. build wins.
